case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE VS LEGAL SERVICE FOR CHILDREN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,289.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT LEGAL SERVICE FOR CHILDREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEGAL SERVICE FOR CHILDREN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
